title: CrashBlock
description: Custom Blocks. CrashBlock allows you to create fully custom blocks and easily animate them using the integrated Model Editor.
body:
This is an addon for [CrashPanel | CrashCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashpanel).

CrashBlock allows you to create custom blocks.  You can use custom textures or models easily with the intuitive panel. Thanks to the Script Editor you can program your blocks in endless different ways. With Model Editor you can customize your blocks with custom animations.
**CrashCore is required.**

### Features:
- Custom Blocks
- Custom World Generators
- World Markers
- Script Editor

### Commands:
- /crashblock [id or name] = gives custom blocks

### Permissions:
- crashblock.command.crashblock = Permission to give custom blocks

### Modules on CrashPanel:
- Custom Block List
- Block Information
- Block Properties
- Block Script
- Block Custom Model

### Transparency Matters
- The marketplace contains material published by any user. Each material is checked by the team before being public.
- Simple registration is required to use the panel.
- More information on the [CrashPanel | CrashCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashpanel) page.

### Documents:
- [Terms and Conditions of CrashPlugin](https://crashplugin.com/terms#english)
- [Privacy Policy](https://crashplugin.com/privacy#english)
